examples.target: The car {broke down} on the highway.
Negotiations {broke down} after two days.
She {broke down} and cried when she heard the news.
The old machine finally {broke down}.
She {brought up} an important topic at the meeting.
examples.source: Toplantıda önemli bir konuyu gündeme getirdi.

examples.target: Don't {bring up} old arguments.
He was {brought up} by his grandparents.
Can I {bring up} a concern before we finish?
examples.source: Bitirmeden önce bir endişeyi gündeme getirebilir miyim?

examples.target: The team {carried out} the experiment successfully.
The plan was {carried out} exactly as agreed.
examples.source: Plan tam olarak kararlaştırıldığı gibi uygulandı.

examples.target: Workers {carried out} repairs on the bridge.
She {carried out} her duties with great care.
examples.source: Görevlerini büyük bir özenle yerine getirdi.

examples.target: I {came across} this old photo while cleaning.
examples.source: Temizlik yaparken bu eski fotoğrafa rastladım.

examples.target: She {came across} as very confident in the interview.
examples.source: Mülakatta çok kendinden emin bir izlenim verdi.

examples.target: Have you ever {come across} this word before?
examples.source: Bu kelimeyle daha önce karşılaştın mı?

examples.target: He {came across} a rare book in the market.
How do you {deal with} stress at work?
The manager {dealt with} the complaint quickly.
She doesn't know how to {deal with} criticism.
We must {deal with} the problem before it gets worse.
examples.source: Sorun daha da kötüleşmeden önce üstesinden gelmeliyiz.

examples.target: I need to {find out} what time the train leaves.
She {found out} about the surprise party.
He was shocked when he {found out} the truth.
We need to {find out} more before deciding.
examples.source: Karar vermeden önce daha fazla bilgi edinmemiz gerekiyor.

examples.target: Don't {give up} — you're almost there!
She {gave up} smoking three years ago.
He {gave up} his seat for the elderly woman.
I refuse to {give up} on my dreams.
She {went through} a difficult time last year.
examples.source: Geçen yıl zor bir dönem geçirdi.

examples.target: Let's {go through} the plan one more time.
examples.source: Planı bir kez daha gözden geçirelim.

examples.target: He {went through} his notes before the exam.
The proposal {went through} many revisions.
It's hard to {keep up} with all the news.
{Keep up} the good work!
She struggled to {keep up} with the rest of the class.
examples.source: Sınıfın geri kalanına ayak uydurmakta zorlandı.

examples.target: He couldn't {keep up} with the pace of the game.
The police are {looking into} the incident.
She {looked into} the possibility of studying abroad.
We will {look into} the complaint and respond.
I'll {look into} it and get back to you.
Women {make up} sixty percent of the workforce.
examples.source: Kadınlar iş gücünün yüzde altmışını oluşturuyor.

examples.target: He {made up} an excuse for being late.
examples.source: Geç kalmak için bir bahane uydurdu.

examples.target: They had a fight but {made up} the next day.
examples.source: Kavga ettiler ama ertesi gün barıştılar.

examples.target: She {made up} the missed class the following week.
examples.source: Kaçırdığı dersi aşağıdaki hafta telafi etti.

examples.target: Stop {putting off} tasks until the last minute.
The meeting was {put off} until next week.
His rude behavior {put her off}.
Don't {put off} what you can do today.
We {ran out of} coffee and had to buy more.
examples.source: Kahvemiz bitti ve daha fazla almak zorunda kaldık.

examples.target: She {ran out of} time before finishing the exam.
The factory {ran out of} raw materials.
Don't let the car {run out of} fuel.
They {set up} a new company last year.
examples.source: Geçen yıl yeni bir şirket kurdular.

examples.target: Can you {set up} the projector for the meeting?
She {set up} a fund to help students.
examples.source: Öğrencilere yardım etmek için bir fon kurdu.

examples.target: He {set up} his office at home.
She {turned down} the job offer.
Please {turn down} the music — it's too loud.
He {turned down} the heating to save energy.
His application was {turned down} twice.
Make sure you get {adequate} sleep every night.
examples.source: Her gece yeterince uyuduğunuzdan emin olun.

examples.target: The salary is {adequate} for a single person.
examples.source: Maaş tek bir kişi için yeterli.

examples.target: The food was not {adequate} for everyone.
We need {adequate} resources to complete the project.
examples.source: Projeyi tamamlamak için yeterli kaynaklara ihtiyacımız var.

examples.target: Is this product {available} in other colors?
examples.source: Bu ürün başka renklerde mevcut mu?

examples.target: Are you {available} for a meeting on Friday?
The document is {available} on the website.
Tickets are still {available} for the concert.
She gave a {brief} summary of the report.
The meeting was {brief} but productive.
He made a {brief} stop at the shop.
In {brief}, the plan was a success.
examples.source: Kısaca ifade etmek gerekirse plan başarılı oldu.

examples.target: The office has a {casual} dress code on Fridays.
examples.source: Ofis Cuma günleri rahat kıyafet kuralına sahip.

examples.target: They had a {casual} conversation over coffee.
examples.source: Kahve eşliğinde rahat bir sohbet ettiler.

examples.target: He was too {casual} about the deadline.
examples.source: Son tarih konusunda çok gelişigüzel davrandı.

examples.target: She prefers a {casual} style of clothing.
examples.source: Gündelik bir giyim tarzını tercih ediyor.

examples.target: I am {certain} that she will pass the exam.
{Certain} foods are not allowed in the diet.
It is not {certain} when he will return.
Under {certain} conditions, the plan could work.
examples.source: Belirli koşullar altında plan işe yarayabilir.

examples.target: The hotel room was very {comfortable}.
She finally felt {comfortable} in her new home.
Are you {comfortable} with this decision?
He wore {comfortable} shoes for the long walk.
examples.source: Uzun yürüyüş için rahat ayakkabı giydi.

examples.target: The situation is more {complex} than it looks.
She solved a {complex} mathematical problem.
The human brain is extremely {complex}.
The instructions were too {complex} to follow.
The new law is highly {controversial}.
She expressed a {controversial} opinion.
The book was {controversial} when it was first published.
examples.source: Kitap ilk yayınlandığında tartışmaya yol açtı.

examples.target: Avoid {controversial} topics at dinner.
This is a {critical} moment for the company.
examples.source: Bu şirket için kritik bir andır.

examples.target: She was {critical} of the government's response.
Quick thinking was {critical} in the emergency.
examples.source: Acil durumda hızlı düşünmek kritik öneme sahipti.

examples.target: He gave a {critical} review of the film.
examples.source: Film için eleştirel bir değerlendirme yaptı.

examples.target: The team is looking for a {dynamic} new leader.
examples.source: Ekip dinamik yeni bir lider arıyor.

examples.target: The city has a {dynamic} energy.
She is a {dynamic} speaker who inspires people.
examples.source: İnsanları ilham veren dinamik bir konuşmacı.

examples.target: The market is {dynamic} and changes fast.
Exercise is an {effective} way to reduce stress.
examples.source: Egzersiz stresi azaltmanın etkili bir yoludur.

examples.target: The medicine was very {effective} against the infection.
She is an {effective} communicator.
The new system proved more {effective} than the old one.
examples.source: Yeni sistem eskisinden daha etkili olduğunu kanıtladı.

examples.target: Handle the vase carefully — it is very {fragile}.
The peace agreement is still {fragile}.
She felt emotionally {fragile} after the loss.
examples.source: Kaybın ardından duygusal olarak kırılgan hissetti.

examples.target: The ecosystem is {fragile} and needs protection.
examples.source: Ekosistem kırılgandır ve korumaya ihtiyaç duyar.

examples.target: Is this painting {genuine} or a copy?
examples.source: Bu tablo gerçek mi yoksa kopya mı?

examples.target: She showed {genuine} concern for her friend.
examples.source: Arkadaşına karşı içten bir endişe gösterdi.

examples.target: His apology seemed {genuine}.
A {genuine} smile is easy to recognize.
The teacher gave {harsh} criticism.
The weather conditions were {harsh} in winter.
She spoke to him in a {harsh} tone.
Life in the desert is {harsh} for most animals.
examples.source: Çöldeki yaşam çoğu hayvan için çetindir.

examples.target: Change is {inevitable} in any organization.
It was {inevitable} that they would disagree.
Death is an {inevitable} part of life.
The conflict seemed {inevitable} from the start.
It's a personal {affair} — please don't ask.
examples.source: Bu kişisel bir meseledir — lütfen sorma.

examples.target: Foreign {affairs} are handled by the ministry.
The wedding was a grand {affair}.
Business {affairs} were booming that year.
examples.source: O yıl iş işleri gayet iyiydi.

examples.target: She made a second {attempt} to pass the driving test.
examples.source: Sürücü sınavını geçmek için ikinci bir girişimde bulundu.

examples.target: The first {attempt} failed, but they tried again.
examples.source: İlk deneme başarısız oldu ama tekrar denediler.

examples.target: He made an {attempt} to climb the mountain.
Every {attempt} to contact her was unsuccessful.
examples.source: Onu aramak için her girişim başarısız oldu.

examples.target: The campaign raised {awareness} about mental health.
examples.source: Kampanya ruh sağlığı konusunda farkındalık yarattı.

examples.target: {Awareness} of the risks helped prevent accidents.
examples.source: Risklerin farkında olmak kazaları önlemeye yardımcı oldu.

examples.target: Her {awareness} of her surroundings saved her.
Public {awareness} about climate change is growing.
examples.source: İklim değişikliği hakkında kamuoyu bilinci artıyor.

examples.target: She ran a successful election {campaign}.
The charity launched a fundraising {campaign}.
examples.source: Hayır kurumu bir bağış toplama kampanyası başlattı.

examples.target: The advertising {campaign} increased sales.
They ran a {campaign} against plastic pollution.
examples.source: Plastik kirliliğine karşı bir kampanya yürüttüler.

examples.target: Her health is a major {concern} for the family.
He expressed {concern} about the rising costs.
examples.source: Artan maliyetler konusundaki endişesini dile getirdi.

examples.target: Environmental issues are of great {concern}.
The safety of the workers is our primary {concern}.
The country is going through an economic {crisis}.
She stayed calm during the {crisis}.
The government responded quickly to the food {crisis}.
examples.source: Hükümet gıda krizine hızla müdahale etti.

examples.target: A {crisis} can reveal a person's true character.
examples.source: Bir kriz kişinin gerçek karakterini ortaya çıkarabilir.

examples.target: There is a high {demand} for skilled workers.
She met all the client's {demands}.
Supply cannot keep up with {demand}.
The workers made a {demand} for higher wages.
examples.source: İşçiler daha yüksek ücret talebinde bulundu.

examples.target: Everyone must follow the rules without {exception}.
With the {exception} of Sundays, the shop is open daily.
examples.source: Pazar günleri hariç dükkan her gün açık.

examples.target: She is an {exception} to the general rule.
No {exceptions} will be made to the policy.
Diet is an important {factor} in good health.
examples.source: Diyet iyi sağlık için önemli bir faktördür.

examples.target: Several {factors} led to the company's success.
examples.source: Şirketin başarısına birkaç faktör yol açtı.

examples.target: Stress is a major {factor} in many illnesses.
examples.source: Stres pek çok hastalığın önemli bir etkenidir.

examples.target: Cost is a key {factor} in the decision.
There is a {gap} in the market for this product.
examples.source: Bu ürün için piyasada bir boşluk var.

examples.target: The wealth {gap} between rich and poor is growing.
examples.source: Zengin ile fakir arasındaki uçurum büyüyor.

examples.target: She took a year off to fill a {gap} in her skills.
examples.source: Beceri eksikliğini gidermek için bir yıl izin aldı.

examples.target: There is a {gap} between what was promised and delivered.
examples.source: Vaat edilen ile teslim edilen arasında bir uçurum var.

examples.target: The decision had a major {impact} on the team.
examples.source: Karar ekip üzerinde büyük bir etki bıraktı.

examples.target: Technology has had a huge {impact} on education.
examples.source: Teknoloji eğitim üzerinde büyük bir etki yarattı.

examples.target: The {impact} of the accident was felt for years.
She wants to make a positive {impact} on society.
examples.source: Toplum üzerinde olumlu bir etki bırakmak istiyor.

examples.target: The police investigated the {incident}.
There was an {incident} at the factory yesterday.
The security team reported the {incident}.
The two countries discussed the border {incident}.
We need to address this {issue} immediately.
examples.source: Bu sorunu derhal ele almamız gerekiyor.

examples.target: Environmental {issues} are a global concern.
examples.source: Çevre sorunları küresel bir endişe kaynağıdır.

examples.target: Have you read the latest {issue} of the magazine?
The main {issue} is the lack of funding.
Her family is her top {priority}.
We need to set {priorities} before starting.
Safety is the number one {priority}.
He always gives work the highest {priority}.
examples.source: Her zaman işe en yüksek önceliği verir.

examples.target: Working from home has become a major {trend}.
examples.source: Evden çalışmak büyük bir trend haline geldi.

examples.target: She always follows the latest fashion {trends}.
examples.source: Her zaman en son moda trendlerini takip eder.

examples.target: The {trend} toward healthier eating is growing.
The data shows a {trend} toward online shopping.
examples.source: Veriler, çevrimiçi alışverişe yönelik bir eğilim olduğunu gösteriyor.

examples.target: Technology continues to {advance} rapidly.
The army {advanced} toward the city.
She {advanced} her career by taking on new challenges.
The date of the meeting was {advanced} by one week.
examples.source: Toplantı tarihi bir hafta öne alındı.

examples.target: The old building {collapsed} during the earthquake.
He {collapsed} from exhaustion after the race.
The company {collapsed} due to financial problems.
The bridge {collapsed} under the heavy load.
A clear winner {emerged} after the vote.
examples.source: Oylamadan sonra net bir kazanan ortaya çıktı.

examples.target: New evidence {emerged} during the investigation.
examples.source: Soruşturma sırasında yeni deliller ortaya çıktı.

examples.target: She {emerged} from the water laughing.
Several new technologies {emerged} that decade.
examples.source: O on yılda birkaç yeni teknoloji ortaya çıktı.

examples.target: Exercise can {enhance} your mood.
The new features {enhance} the user experience.
She used a filter to {enhance} the photo.
Training programs {enhance} employee performance.
Languages {evolve} over time.
The company has {evolved} significantly in ten years.
examples.source: Şirket on yılda önemli ölçüde gelişti.

examples.target: Technology {evolves} faster than ever before.
examples.source: Teknoloji her zamankinden daha hızlı evrilmektedir.

examples.target: Her ideas {evolved} as she gathered more information.
examples.source: Daha fazla bilgi topladıkça fikirleri gelişti.

examples.target: The company plans to {expand} into new markets.
The city has {expanded} rapidly over the past decade.
examples.source: Şehir son on yılda hızla büyüdü.

examples.target: She wants to {expand} her knowledge of history.
Metal {expands} when it is heated.
Sales {increased} by twenty percent last year.
examples.source: Geçen yıl satışlar yüzde yirmi arttı.

examples.target: They plan to {increase} the staff by fifty people.
Prices have {increased} significantly this year.
examples.source: Fiyatlar bu yıl önemli ölçüde arttı.

examples.target: Regular practice will {increase} your confidence.
She {overcame} her fear of public speaking.
examples.source: Halk önünde konuşma korkusunun üstesinden geldi.

examples.target: He {overcame} many obstacles to reach his goal.
examples.source: Hedefine ulaşmak için pek çok engeli aştı.

examples.target: With effort, you can {overcome} any challenge.
The team {overcame} the deficit and won the match.
examples.source: Takım açığın üstesinden geldi ve maçı kazandı.

examples.target: We need to {reduce} our carbon emissions.
Exercise can {reduce} the risk of heart disease.
The company {reduced} prices to attract customers.
examples.source: Şirket müşteri çekmek için fiyatları düşürdü.

examples.target: She {reduced} her screen time to sleep better.
examples.source: Daha iyi uyumak için ekran süresini azalttı.

examples.target: The government plans to {reform} the education system.
examples.source: Hükümet eğitim sistemini reforme etmeyi planlıyor.

examples.target: He was determined to {reform} his bad habits.
The law was {reformed} to better protect workers.
examples.source: Yasa işçileri daha iyi korumak için reforme edildi.

examples.target: Many countries are trying to {reform} their healthcare systems.
examples.source: Pek çok ülke sağlık sistemlerini reforme etmeye çalışıyor.

examples.target: She {replaced} the broken window.
Technology is slowly {replacing} traditional methods.
examples.source: Teknoloji geleneksel yöntemlerin yerini yavaş yavaş alıyor.

examples.target: He was {replaced} by a younger employee.
You need to {replace} the battery in this remote.
The old painting was {restored} to its original beauty.
They worked hard to {restore} peace to the region.
examples.source: Bölgeye barışı yeniden getirmek için çok çalıştılar.

examples.target: The power was {restored} after three hours.
examples.source: Elektrik üç saatin ardından yeniden verildi.

examples.target: She {restored} her old bicycle to perfect condition.
Public opinion has {shifted} on this issue.
She {shifted} her focus from work to family.
He works the night {shift} at the factory.
The wind {shifted} direction during the storm.
The new management {transformed} the company.
Technology has {transformed} the way we communicate.
examples.source: Teknoloji iletişim biçimimizi köklü biçimde değiştirdi.

examples.target: She {transformed} the old garage into a studio.
Exercise {transformed} his health and confidence.
Prices {vary} from store to store.
The results {varied} depending on the conditions.
She likes to {vary} her diet to stay healthy.
examples.source: Sağlıklı kalmak için diyetini çeşitlendirmeyi seviyor.

examples.target: Weather can {vary} greatly in spring.
examples.source: Hava ilkbaharda büyük ölçüde değişkenlik gösterebilir.

examples.target: She lost her {appetite} when she felt ill.
The exercise gave him a big {appetite}.
examples.source: Egzersiz ona büyük bir iştah verdi.

examples.target: His {appetite} for knowledge is endless.
A good meal is best enjoyed with a healthy {appetite}.
examples.source: İyi bir yemek sağlıklı bir iştahla daha iyi tadılır.

examples.target: Some {bacteria} can cause serious infections.
examples.source: Bazı bakteriler ciddi enfeksiyonlara yol açabilir.

examples.target: Wash your hands to remove harmful {bacteria}.
examples.source: Zararlı bakterileri uzaklaştırmak için ellerinizi yıkayın.

examples.target: Not all {bacteria} are harmful — some are beneficial.
examples.source: Tüm bakteriler zararlı değil — bazıları faydalı.

examples.target: Antibiotics kill {bacteria} that cause illness.
examples.source: Antibiyotikler hastalığa yol açan bakterileri öldürür.

examples.target: She was {conscious} of the risks involved.
He became {conscious} again ten minutes after the fall.
examples.source: Düşmeden on dakika sonra yeniden bilincini kazandı.

examples.target: Make a {conscious} effort to eat healthier.
examples.source: Daha sağlıklı beslenmeye bilinçli bir çaba harcayın.

examples.target: She is very {conscious} of her posture.
A balanced {diet} is important for good health.
examples.source: Dengeli bir diyet iyi sağlık için önemlidir.

examples.target: She went on a strict {diet} to lose weight.
examples.source: Kilo vermek için katı bir diyete girdi.

examples.target: His {diet} includes lots of fruits and vegetables.
examples.source: Beslenme düzeni bol meyve ve sebze içeriyor.

examples.target: A vegetarian {diet} excludes meat and fish.
examples.source: Vejetaryen diyet et ve balığı dışarıda bırakır.

examples.target: {Fatigue} can be a symptom of many conditions.
examples.source: Yorgunluk pek çok durumun belirtisi olabilir.

examples.target: The long journey caused extreme {fatigue}.
examples.source: Uzun yolculuk aşırı yorgunluğa yol açtı.

examples.target: She suffered from chronic {fatigue} syndrome.
Mental {fatigue} is just as real as physical fatigue.
examples.source: Zihinsel yorgunluk fiziksel yorgunluk kadar gerçektir.

examples.target: The child had a high {fever} all night.
examples.source: Çocuğun bütün gece yüksek ateşi vardı.

examples.target: A {fever} is a sign that your body is fighting infection.
examples.source: Ateş, vücudunuzun enfeksiyonla savaştığının bir işaretidir.

examples.target: She took medicine to bring down her {fever}.
He went to the hospital when his {fever} reached 40 degrees.
{Germs} spread easily in crowded places.
Wash your hands to kill {germs}.
The {germ} that caused the outbreak was identified.
examples.source: Salgına yol açan mikrop tespit edildi.

examples.target: Covering your mouth when you sneeze stops {germs} spreading.
examples.source: Hapşırırken ağzınızı kapatmak mikropların yayılmasını engeller.

examples.target: The doctor diagnosed a bacterial {infection}.
The wound became swollen due to {infection}.
Wash the cut to prevent {infection}.
The virus spread quickly, causing a widespread {infection}.
examples.source: Virüs hızla yayıldı ve yaygın bir enfeksiyona yol açtı.

examples.target: He suffered a knee {injury} during the match.
The accident caused serious {injuries}.
She needs rest to recover from her {injury}.
Wearing a helmet prevents head {injuries}.
The doctor prescribed a {painkiller} for her headache.
examples.source: Doktor baş ağrısı için ağrı kesici yazdı.

examples.target: He took a {painkiller} after the surgery.
{Painkillers} should not be taken without medical advice.
examples.source: Ağrı kesiciler tıbbi tavsiye olmadan alınmamalıdır.

examples.target: The {painkiller} helped her sleep through the night.
examples.source: Ağrı kesici gece boyunca uyumasına yardımcı oldu.

examples.target: She went through months of {rehabilitation} after her accident.
The center offers {rehabilitation} programs for patients.
examples.source: Merkez hastalar için rehabilitasyon programları sunuyor.

examples.target: Physical {rehabilitation} helped him walk again.
examples.source: Fizik tedavi yeniden yürüyebilmesine yardımcı oldu.

examples.target: Drug {rehabilitation} programs save many lives.
examples.source: Uyuşturucu rehabilitasyon programları pek çok hayat kurtarıyor.

examples.target: Work {stress} can affect your health.
She uses yoga to manage {stress}.
Too much {stress} leads to burnout.
He was under enormous {stress} before the exam.
examples.source: Sınavdan önce muazzam bir stres altındaydı.

examples.target: Take the pill and {swallow} it with water.
He {swallowed} the food too quickly.
She found it hard to {swallow} the bad news.
Babies learn to {swallow} solid food slowly.
examples.source: Bebekler katı besinleri yutmayı yavaş yavaş öğrenir.

examples.target: The doctor recommended a new {treatment} for her condition.
examples.source: Doktor durumu için yeni bir tedavi önerdi.

examples.target: The {treatment} lasted for six months.
She complained about her unfair {treatment}.
Early {treatment} can prevent serious complications.
The flu is caused by a {virus}.
examples.source: Grip bir virüs tarafından neden olur.

examples.target: The {virus} spread quickly through the population.
Vaccines protect against dangerous {viruses}.
examples.source: Aşılar tehlikeli virüslere karşı koruma sağlar.

examples.target: A computer {virus} damaged all her files.
examples.source: Bir bilgisayar virüsü tüm dosyalarına zarar verdi.
